title: Pistachio Monsoon Medley
description: A peppery, dense mediterranean dish featuring pistachio paste, bhuna spices, and kosher-friendly ingredients to celebrate the monsoon season.

ingredients.name: Bhuna Spices Blend (Turmeric, Chili Powder, Cumin)

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add onions and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in garlic and cumin seeds until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Pour in diced tomatoes, salt, and cook for an additional 10 minutes or until tomatoes soften.
Combine chopped basil leaves, ground pistachios, curry powder, and bhuna spices blend with the tomato mixture. Mix well to combine.
Simmer for another 5-7 minutes allowing flavors to meld together.
Serve hot over rice, naan bread, or as a side dish.
